name: Hilde

conquest.name: Rejuvenating Plea
conquest.description: Immediately restores Health to all friendly heroes.

conquest.name: Redeemer
conquest.description: Immediately restores Health to the weakest friendly hero.

conquest.name: Intimidation
conquest.description: Disables the enemy target for 1 second while dealing damage.

expedition.name: Noble Path
expedition.description: Increases the total squads' Attack and Defense.

expedition.name: Elixir of Strength
expedition.description: Grants all squads' attacks a 25% chance of dealing increased damage.

expedition.name: Trial by Fire
expedition.description: Chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Holy Invocation
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Amplifies Hilde's healing effects. Unlocked only when Revelation is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Fortitude
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Health of defender troops. Unlocked only when Revelation is equipped.

order: Focus Noble Path and Elixir of Strength early

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Hilde heals and stacks. Pairs with Zoe + Jabel core tanks.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Hilde is THE premier healer + disabler. Her Rejuvenating Plea heals all friendly heroes while Redeemer tops off the weakest. Paired with any frontline tank (Zoe, Jabel, Triton), she extends the lineup's survival window indefinitely. Her Intimidation 1s disable gives tanks a window to reposition.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js baseline (4-source cross-verified) marks Hilde as F2P=false. However, kingshotwiki lists 6 acquisition methods including F2P pools (Hall of Heroes, Daily Deals). The reconciliation is that while Hilde's shards are technically obtainable through F2P routes, she's not practically F2P-viable — shard accumulation rates are slow enough that spenders get her realistically while F2P players struggle. Community guides treat her as a 'premium healer' rather than an F2P pick. Using heroes.js baseline as authoritative.
sources: kingshotwiki (6 access methods flagged as technically available)
f2p_investment.discrepancy_note: If the Architect believes Hilde should be F2P-accessible, consider raising viable_as_f2p to true with a 'slow shard accumulation' note.

rally.reasoning: Not a rally lead. Her value is support/healing.

garrison.reasoning: Premier healer with disable utility. Core of any premium garrison lineup.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Strong bear hunt joiner via squad buffs + healing sustain.

joiner.reasoning: S-tier joiner for garrison stacking — her healing stacks with other defenders' sustain, making her invaluable in stacked garrison compositions.

lore_background.title: The Blind Paladin with Spiritual Sight
lore_background.backstory: Hilde was educated at a church but contracted a hereditary eye disease at fourteen. Through divine revelation, she studied pharmacology and managed to slow her condition's progression. An archbishop she trusted later stole her eyes, but instead of breaking her, the betrayal awakened a supernatural 'spiritual sight' — an ability to perceive her surroundings despite physical blindness. She became a healer and a warrior, her faith tested and forged anew.

deep_analysis: Hilde is the premier healer of Kingshot — a Gen 2 Legendary Cavalry hero whose kit is built around keeping allies alive. Her Conquest tree is pure support: Rejuvenating Plea heals ALL friendly heroes for up to 280% of her Attack at once, Redeemer tops off the weakest ally for up to 140% of her Attack, and Intimidation disables an enemy target for 1 second while still dealing up to 196% Attack damage. Her Expedition skills buff the whole army: Noble Path adds +15% squad Attack and +10% squad Defense, Elixir of Strength grants a 25% proc chance for +200% damage, and Trial by Fire has up to a 40% chance to halve incoming squad damage. Her exclusive gear Revelation adds +540 Attack, +540 Defense, +5400 Health, +60% Lethality, +60% Health at max level, and unlocks two more skills: Holy Invocation (amplifies her healing effects by up to 70%) and Fortitude (+15% Health for defender troops). Her tier ratings from heroes.js are S-tier Garrison, S-tier Joiner, A-tier Bear Hunt, B-tier Rally — she's the support core every premium garrison is built around. She's VIP-gated per heroes.js baseline (kingshotwiki lists 6 access methods including F2P pools, but community consensus treats her as a premium hero). Her lore is haunting: blinded by hereditary disease at fourteen, betrayed by the archbishop who stole her eyes, she developed spiritual sight — a supernatural perception that lets her fight and heal despite physical blindness. She's the faithful wounded healer, the paladin whose wounds became her weapon.
unverified_fields: f2p_investment — heroes.js says false, kingshotwiki shows 6 access methods. Interpretation conflict flagged for audit.

handbook_meta.description: Hilde is the only hero with dual effect_op codes (102 + 112) in a single skill, enabling multiplicative stacking opportunities unavailable with any other hero. Her flexibility as a joiner, garrison defender, and Conquest healer makes her one of the highest-value investments in the game.
